languages.text: "Смилуйтесь, {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}! Мы верные слуги Империума и династии фон Валанциус! Мы... Как можно было признаться в столь омерзительной ереси? Мы страшились вашего гнева, ибо как самые преданные служители Его, прекрасно осознаем цену своего греха!"

traits.locale_text: "Смилуйтесь, {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}! Мы верные слуги Империума и династии фон Валанциус! Мы... Как можно было признаться в столь омерзительной ереси? Мы страшились вашего гнева, ибо как самые преданные служители Его, прекрасно осознаем цену своего греха!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "Spare us, Heavenly Envoy! We are loyal servants of the Imperium and the von Valancius dynasty! We... How could be admit to such a disgusting heresy? We dreaded your wrath, for we are His most devoted servants and realise the terrible price of our downfall!"
languages.original_text: "Смилуйтесь, {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}! Мы верные слуги Империума и династии фон Валанциус! Мы... Как можно было признаться в столь омерзительной ереси? Мы страшились вашего гнева, ибо как самые преданные служители Его, прекрасно осознаем цену своего греха!"

traits.locale_text: "Spare us, Heavenly Envoy! We are loyal servants of the Imperium and von Valancius dynasty! We... How could be admit to such a disgusting heresy? We dreaded your wrath, for we are His most devoted servants and realize the terrible price of our downfall!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "Spare us, Heavenly Envoy! We are loyal servants of the Imperium and von Valancius dynasty! We... How could be admit to such a disgusting heresy? We dreaded your wrath, for we are His most devoted servants and realize the terrible price of our downfall!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "Spare us, Heavenly Envoy! We are loyal servants of the Imperium and the von Valancius dynasty! We... How could be admit to such a disgusting heresy? We dreaded your wrath, for we are His most devoted servants and realise the terrible price of our downfall!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "Verschont uns, himmlischer Gesandter! Wir sind treue Diener des Imperiums und der von Valancius-Dynastie! Wir... Wie konnten wir eine solch abscheuliche Ketzerei zulassen? Wir fürchteten Euren Zorn, denn wir sind Seine treuesten Diener und wissen um den schrecklichen Preis unseres Untergangs!"
languages.original_text: "Spare us, Heavenly Envoy! We are loyal servants of the Imperium and the von Valancius dynasty! We... How could be admit to such a disgusting heresy? We dreaded your wrath, for we are His most devoted servants and realise the terrible price of our downfall!"

languages.text: "Épargnez-nous, Envoyé céleste ! Nous sommes de loyaux serviteurs de l'Imperium et de la dynastie von Valancius ! Nous... Comment pourrions-nous admettre une hérésie aussi dégoûtante ? Nous redoutions votre colère, car nous sommes ses serviteurs les plus dévoués et nous sommes conscients du prix terrible de notre chute !"
languages.original_text: "Spare us, Heavenly Envoy! We are loyal servants of the Imperium and the von Valancius dynasty! We... How could be admit to such a disgusting heresy? We dreaded your wrath, for we are His most devoted servants and realise the terrible price of our downfall!"

languages.text: "饶了我们吧，天国特使！我们是帝国和冯-瓦兰修斯王朝的忠臣我们怎么会承认如此令人作呕的异端邪说？我们害怕您的愤怒，因为我们是您最忠实的仆人，我们意识到我们的堕落会带来多么可怕的代价！"
languages.original_text: "Spare us, Heavenly Envoy! We are loyal servants of the Imperium and the von Valancius dynasty! We... How could be admit to such a disgusting heresy? We dreaded your wrath, for we are His most devoted servants and realise the terrible price of our downfall!"

languages.text: "¡Perdónanos, Enviado Celestial! ¡Somos leales servidores del Imperio y de la dinastía von Valancius! Nosotros... ¿Cómo podríamos admitir una herejía tan repugnante? Temíamos tu ira, ¡pues somos sus más devotos servidores y somos conscientes del terrible precio de nuestra caída!"
languages.original_text: "Spare us, Heavenly Envoy! We are loyal servants of the Imperium and the von Valancius dynasty! We... How could be admit to such a disgusting heresy? We dreaded your wrath, for we are His most devoted servants and realise the terrible price of our downfall!"

languages.text: "天の使者よ、我らを許したまえ！私たちは、インペリアムとフォン・ヴァランシウス王朝の忠実な下僕です！我々は...どうしてこのような醜悪な異端を認めることができましょうか？私たちはあなたの怒りを恐れていました。なぜなら、私たちは主の最も献身的な僕であり、私たちの没落の恐ろしい代償を理解しているからです！"
languages.original_text: "Spare us, Heavenly Envoy! We are loyal servants of the Imperium and the von Valancius dynasty! We... How could be admit to such a disgusting heresy? We dreaded your wrath, for we are His most devoted servants and realise the terrible price of our downfall!"

languages.text: "Bizi bağışlayın, İlahi Elçi! Bizler İmparatorluğun ve von Valancius hanedanının sadık hizmetkarlarıyız! Biz... Böyle iğrenç bir sapkınlığı nasıl kabul edebiliriz? Gazabınızdan korktuk, çünkü biz O'nun en sadık hizmetkârlarıyız ve düşüşümüzün korkunç bedelinin farkındayız!"
languages.original_text: "Spare us, Heavenly Envoy! We are loyal servants of the Imperium and the von Valancius dynasty! We... How could be admit to such a disgusting heresy? We dreaded your wrath, for we are His most devoted servants and realise the terrible price of our downfall!"
